title: NA-Non ULIP
word_text:
Term Insurance Online Vs Offline
There are two modes in which you can buy a term insurance plan. One is the online mode wherein you can visit the insurance company’s website or an online marketplace, find the policy, fill in your details in an online application form, pay the premium digitally and buy the plan. The second is the offline method wherein you either visit the insurance company’s branch office or meet with an intermediary and buy the policy physically. Under the offline method, you fill out a proposal form manually, submit your documents, pay the premium and submit the proposal.
Both online and offline term plans allow you to buy the policy depending on your needs. The only major difference between online term plan vs offline term plan is the mode and how it affects the purchase process. Let’s understand in detail.
What Is the Difference Between Online and Offline Term Plan?
Some of the major differences between online and offline term plans are as follows –
Benefits of Online Term Plan
Some of the benefits of an online term plan are as follows –
Easy to buy
Online term plans are quick and easy to buy. You just need an internet connection and a device connected to the internet to buy the policy. You can apply for the coverage at any time and from any place. The purchase process is simple and does not take a lot of time allowing you to get covered at the earliest.
Facility of comparison
With the online mode, you can compare across-term insurance plans offered by different insurance companies. This helps you find a plan which offers the most comprehensive and suitable coverage at the most competitive premium rates.
You can compare, find the right plan and then buy it easily.
Transparency
Online term plans list the complete terms and conditions of the policy for you to check. You can check the brochure and policy wordings to understand what the policy is offering and the conditions to enjoy complete coverage. There’s no risk of mis-selling and you can buy the policy with complete information.
Feasible for remote areas
Online term plans are a good choice in remote areas where the insurance company might not have a branch office or where there are not many intermediaries. In such places, individuals can buy the policy online without having to search for the nearest office or intermediary.
Benefits of Offline Term Plan
Some of the benefits of an offline term plan are as follows –
Personal attention
With an offline term plan, you get the personal attention of an insurance intermediary or an executive of the insurance company. This can help you make the right choice in terms of the plan needed, the right sum assured, the riders that are suitable, etc.
Helps if you are not tech-savvy
If you are not savvy or comfortable with using the online medium to buy a term plan, the offline mode is a safer and more reliable way to buy. Many individuals depend on their trusted agents or brokers to buy the policy rather than choosing the online mode.
Help at the time of claim
When you buy the term plan from a trusted insurance intermediary, you can get his assistance at the time of claim. The intermediary can explain the claim procedure, help you with the documentation and ensure that the claim is settled on time. With online term plans, you have to understand the claim process yourself and make the claim to get the settlement.
Helps in understanding the policy terms
Life insurance has some technical details that average individuals might not understand. While the online medium offers relevant information, understanding the terms might prove challenging. This is where the offline mode becomes relevant. The intermediaries or company executives can help individuals understand the terms and conditions of the policy so that they can make an informed choice.
Is It Safe to Buy Term Insurance Online?
When you choose the insurance company’s official website or a trusted and reputed online marketplace, buying term insurance online becomes safe. Such websites have the highest measures of safety and encryption in place which protects your personal and financial data and helps you purchase the policy safely.
So, when buying term insurance online, make sure to buy from trusted and reputed websites which are secured.
Conclusion
Both online term plan vs offline offers financial security against the risk of premature demise. There are pros and cons to term plans online vs offline and it depends on your choice and suitability which mode you choose to buy the coverage. Assess these pros and cons and then choose the right mode to buy the policy. Choose a suitable coverage so that you and your family can enjoy complete financial security.
FAQ
Is online life insurance reliable?
Yes, an online life insurance policy is as reliable as an offline one. however, you should choose to buy the online policy from a reputed and trusted platform which is secured against possible cybercrimes like the insurer’s official website or a trusted online marketplace. This would ensure a safe purchase and you would also get reliable coverage.
Information gathered from
https://www.livemint.com/insurance/news/confused-about-buying-term-insurance-via-online-or-offline-channel-here-s-help-11609853522333.html
https://www.businesstoday.in/personal-finance/insurance/story/online-v-s-offline-term-plans-which-is-a-better-option-51273-2015-09-21
https://www.tomorrowmakers.com/life-insurance/it-better-buy-term-insurance-online-or-offline-article
https://www.hindustantimes.com/brand-stories/comparing-the-online-term-plan-with-the-one-that-is-available-offline-101656509407902.html

The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. full_pdf_text:
Term Insurance Online Vs Offline
There are two modes in which you can buy a term insurance plan. One is the online mode wherein you can visit the insurance company’s website or an online marketplace, find the policy, fill in your details in an online application form, pay the premium digitally and buy the plan. The second is the offline method wherein you either visit the insurance company’s branch office or meet with an intermediary and buy the policy physically. Under the offline method, you fill out a proposal form manually, submit your documents, pay the premium and submit the proposal.
Both online and offline modes of buying term plans allow you to buy the policy depending on your needs. The only major difference between online vs offline is the mode and how it affects the purchase process. Let’s understand in detail.
What Is the Difference Between buying Term Plan Online and Offline?
Some of the major differences between buying term plans online and offline are as follows –
Online Offline You buy the policy online through a computer or a Smartphone
You buy the policy offline either by visiting the branch office or through an insurance agent or broker You can compare plans instantly at your fingertips and find the right premium for the plan. This helps in saving the premium outgo.
You have to talk to insurance agents or brokers or visit the branch office of different insurance companies. If you are unsure of the benefits, or need more details, you can choose the offline mode. You can buy the policy from the comfort of your home, office or even on the go
You can buy the policy by visiting the branch office or meeting the insurance agent or broker, who will guide you through different plans and help make an informed decision.
Benefits of buying Term Plan online
Some of the benefits of online mode are as follows –
1. Easy to buy
Online mode is quick and easy to buy. You just need an internet connection and a device connected to the internet to buy the policy. You can apply for the coverage at any time and from any place. The purchase process is simple and does not take a lot of time allowing you to get covered at the earliest.
2. Facility of comparison
With the online mode, you can compare across-term insurance plans offered by different insurance companies. This helps you find a plan which offers the most comprehensive and suitable coverage at the most competitive premium rates. You can compare, find the right plan and then buy it easily.
3. Transparency
Term plans list the complete terms and conditions of the policy online for you to check. You can check the brochure and policy wordings to understand what the policy is offering and the conditions to enjoy complete coverage. There’s no risk of mis-selling and you can buy the policy with complete information.
4. Feasible for remote areas
Buying term plans online could be a good choice in remote areas where the insurance company might not have a branch office or where there are not many intermediaries. In such places, individuals can buy the policy online without having to search for the nearest office or intermediary.
Benefits of buying Term Plan offline
Some of the benefits of an offline term plan are as follows –
1. Personal attention
With an offline term plan, you get the personal attention of an insurance intermediary or an executive of the insurance company. This can help you make the right choice in terms of the plan needed, the right sum assured, the riders that are suitable, etc.
2. Helps if you are not tech-savvy
If you are not savvy or comfortable with using the online medium to buy a term plan, the offline mode is a safer and more reliable way to buy. Many individuals depend on their trusted agents or brokers to buy the policy rather than choosing the online mode.
3. Help at the time of claim
When you buy the term plan from a trusted insurance intermediary, you can get his assistance at the time of claim. The intermediary can explain the claim procedure, help you with the documentation and ensure that the claim is settled on time.
4. Helps in understanding the policy terms
Life insurance has some technical details that average individuals might not understand. The intermediaries or company executives can help individuals understand the terms and conditions of the policy so that they can make an informed choice.
Is It Safe to Buy Term Insurance Online?
When you choose the insurance company’s official website or a trusted and reputed online marketplace, buying term insurance online becomes safe. Such websites have the highest measures of safety and encryption in place which protects your personal and financial data and helps you purchase the policy safely.
So, when buying term insurance online, make sure to buy from trusted and reputed websites which are secured.
Conclusion
Both the modes online and offline for buying term plans offers financial security against the risk of premature demise. There are pros and cons of buying online vs buying offline and it depends on your choice and suitability which mode you choose to buy the coverage. Assess these pros and cons
and then choose the right mode to buy the policy. Choose a suitable coverage so that you and your family can enjoy complete financial security.
FAQ
● Is buying life insurance online reliable? Yes, buying life insurance policy online is as reliable as buying it offline. However, you should choose to buy the policy online from a reputed and trusted platform which is secured against possible cybercrimes like the insurer’s official website or a trusted online marketplace. This would ensure a safe purchase and you would also get reliable coverage.
